## Meeting Purpose

[Hand off engagement to Matt and review content strategy and performance.](https://fathom.video/share/pWWRbdhx4SFJbysDv-9RhZh9ZsJJJ456?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Engagement Manager Handoff:** Matt (GrowthX) is now the primary contact, taking over from Aida. Khalil is the new content writer.](https://fathom.video/share/pWWRbdhx4SFJbysDv-9RhZh9ZsJJJ456?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [**Content Feedback:** Future content must feature the "notebook agent" (for data scientists) and discuss "context engineering" alongside data governance to align with Hex's product suite and AI focus.](https://fathom.video/share/pWWRbdhx4SFJbysDv-9RhZh9ZsJJJ456?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [**AI Visibility Growth:** AI visibility in LLM responses grew \~10% in December. GrowthX will create prompts for Hex's competitor pages (e.g., `Hex vs. Sigma`) to boost their AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/pWWRbdhx4SFJbysDv-9RhZh9ZsJJJ456?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
  - [**Content Prioritization:** Hex's lack of a defined POV on AI creates a review bottleneck for high-priority topics. The plan is to publish foundational articles now and update them later with a more opinionated stance.](https://fathom.video/share/pWWRbdhx4SFJbysDv-9RhZh9ZsJJJ456?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)

## Topics

### Team Handoff

  - [**Engagement Manager:** Matt (GrowthX) is now the primary contact.](https://fathom.video/share/pWWRbdhx4SFJbysDv-9RhZh9ZsJJJ456?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
      - [**Background:** Was on the initial sprint team, ensuring a seamless transition.](https://fathom.video/share/pWWRbdhx4SFJbysDv-9RhZh9ZsJJJ456?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
      - [**Location:** South Africa → meeting time moved earlier to accommodate.](https://fathom.video/share/pWWRbdhx4SFJbysDv-9RhZh9ZsJJJ456?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [**Content Writer:** Khalil (GrowthX) is now the primary writer.](https://fathom.video/share/pWWRbdhx4SFJbysDv-9RhZh9ZsJJJ456?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)

### Content Performance & Feedback

  - [**Published Content:** 10 blog posts are live.](https://fathom.video/share/pWWRbdhx4SFJbysDv-9RhZh9ZsJJJ456?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [**Drafts Reviewed:** Jessica has reviewed drafts for "Data Maturity Model" and "Shadow AI."](https://fathom.video/share/pWWRbdhx4SFJbysDv-9RhZh9ZsJJJ456?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [**Key Feedback for Future Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/pWWRbdhx4SFJbysDv-9RhZh9ZsJJJ456?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
      - [**AI Agents:** Feature the "notebook agent" (for data scientists) in addition to the "threads agent" (for business users).](https://fathom.video/share/pWWRbdhx4SFJbysDv-9RhZh9ZsJJJ456?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
      - [**AI & Governance:** Integrate "context engineering" into all data governance discussions.](https://fathom.video/share/pWWRbdhx4SFJbysDv-9RhZh9ZsJJJ456?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
      - [**AI & Advanced Analytics:** Acknowledge AI's role in advanced analytics.](https://fathom.video/share/pWWRbdhx4SFJbysDv-9RhZh9ZsJJJ456?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [**AI Visibility in LLMs:**](https://fathom.video/share/pWWRbdhx4SFJbysDv-9RhZh9ZsJJJ456?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
      - [**Growth:** AI visibility (tracked via 1,700+ prompts) grew \~10% in December.](https://fathom.video/share/pWWRbdhx4SFJbysDv-9RhZh9ZsJJJ456?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
      - [**Attribution:** The cause is unclear. Peter suspects the homepage relaunch; Aida noted it correlates with publishing velocity.](https://fathom.video/share/pWWRbdhx4SFJbysDv-9RhZh9ZsJJJ456?tab=summary&timestamp=1212.0)
      - [**Competitor Pages:** GrowthX will create prompts for Hex's competitor pages (e.g., `Hex vs. Sigma`) to boost their AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/pWWRbdhx4SFJbysDv-9RhZh9ZsJJJ456?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [**Technical SEO Audit:** A full audit with recommended actions and CSVs was delivered to Notion.](https://fathom.video/share/pWWRbdhx4SFJbysDv-9RhZh9ZsJJJ456?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)

### Content Strategy & Prioritization

  - [**Problem:** Only two approved topics remain.](https://fathom.video/share/pWWRbdhx4SFJbysDv-9RhZh9ZsJJJ456?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
  - [**Tension:** A conflict exists between the urgent need to rank for AI keywords and Hex's lack of a defined POV on AI, which creates a review bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/pWWRbdhx4SFJbysDv-9RhZh9ZsJJJ456?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)
  - [**Solution:** Publish foundational AI articles now and update them later with a more opinionated stance once Hex's POV is solidified.](https://fathom.video/share/pWWRbdhx4SFJbysDv-9RhZh9ZsJJJ456?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)
  - [**Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/pWWRbdhx4SFJbysDv-9RhZh9ZsJJJ456?tab=summary&timestamp=1852.0)
      - [**GrowthX:** Use Hex's paid search keywords to research new AI topics.](https://fathom.video/share/pWWRbdhx4SFJbysDv-9RhZh9ZsJJJ456?tab=summary&timestamp=1852.0)
      - [**Hex:** Peter will review all topic ideas with the Head of Product Marketing to identify potential roadblocks.](https://fathom.video/share/pWWRbdhx4SFJbysDv-9RhZh9ZsJJJ456?tab=summary&timestamp=1815.0)
      - [**GrowthX:** Continue writing for other clusters (competitors, data engineering) in parallel.](https://fathom.video/share/pWWRbdhx4SFJbysDv-9RhZh9ZsJJJ456?tab=summary&timestamp=1852.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jessica:**](https://fathom.video/share/pWWRbdhx4SFJbysDv-9RhZh9ZsJJJ456?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
      - [Provide GrowthX with documentation on Hex's AI agents to build a feature matrix.](https://fathom.video/share/pWWRbdhx4SFJbysDv-9RhZh9ZsJJJ456?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
  - [**Peter:**](https://fathom.video/share/pWWRbdhx4SFJbysDv-9RhZh9ZsJJJ456?tab=summary&timestamp=1815.0)
      - [Send Hex's paid search keywords to GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/pWWRbdhx4SFJbysDv-9RhZh9ZsJJJ456?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)
      - [Review all topic ideas with the Head of Product Marketing to identify potential roadblocks.](https://fathom.video/share/pWWRbdhx4SFJbysDv-9RhZh9ZsJJJ456?tab=summary&timestamp=1815.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/pWWRbdhx4SFJbysDv-9RhZh9ZsJJJ456?tab=summary&timestamp=1852.0)
      - [Implement feedback on reviewed drafts and stage them in the CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/pWWRbdhx4SFJbysDv-9RhZh9ZsJJJ456?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
      - [Use paid search keywords to research new AI topic ideas.](https://fathom.video/share/pWWRbdhx4SFJbysDv-9RhZh9ZsJJJ456?tab=summary&timestamp=1852.0)
      - [Create prompts for Hex's competitor pages to boost their AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/pWWRbdhx4SFJbysDv-9RhZh9ZsJJJ456?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
